name: statsclaw
description: StatsClaw — a multi-agent workflow framework for building, testing, and shipping statistical software packages (R, Python, Julia, Stata, TypeScript, Go, Rust, C, C++) on OpenAI Codex CLI. Port of statsclaw/statsclaw (Claude Code).

interface.shortDescription: 9-agent workflow for building, testing, and shipping statistical packages.
interface.longDescription: StatsClaw coordinates nine specialist agents (leader, planner, builder, tester, scriber, simulator, distiller, reviewer, shipper) under three-pipeline adversarial verification — the code, test, and simulation pipelines never see each other's specs. Supports R, Python, Julia, Stata, TypeScript, Go, Rust, C, and C++. Includes issue patrol, Monte Carlo simulation studies, workspace sync, and a shared brain knowledge system.
defaultPrompt: $ship-it  — commit and push the reviewed changes
